stemHtml: According to the European Regulations on Air Operations, what are the minimum requirements for nomination as a Senior Cabin Crew Member?

options.a: Must have one year experience and completed a senior cabin crew member training course as established by the operator.
options.b: Must have 24 months experience and completed a senior cabin crew member training course as established by the operator.
options.c: Must have three years experience and completed a senior cabin crew member training course as established by the operator.
options.d: Must have 16 months experience and completed a senior cabin crew member training course as established by the operator.
